rationale: The revision only adds an execution metadata file. The required UI and API changes for the five-operation impact matrix and proposed-policy loading are absent, so the acceptance criteria are neither implemented nor verifiable.

findings.summary: The diff does not update `IMPACT_MATRIX_OPERATIONS` to include `create` and `update`; there are no changes to the policy evaluator at the required location.
No proposed-policy state or loading logic was added on the policies page. The required declarations, reset behavior, and second fetch fanout for draft `access_control` are missing.

The only changed file is execution metadata, which provides no implementation or durable evidence that typecheck, lint, or the existing policy-authoring end-to-end test were run successfully against the required code changes.
